summary: Create Viewpoint and Procore Item association
description: A BIM Viewpoint can be associated with other procore items. This API endpoint creates that association.

procore_item.description: Details of Procore item to be linked to a BimViewpoint

item_id.description: Id of the Procore item to be associated

item_type.description: Type of the Procore item to be associated

primary.description: Set as primary viewpoint for the procore item. Only applicable for BimModelRevision
